full_text:
Li Xie (Degong)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Li Xie, styledDegong, was born in Hanzhong. Urged that King Liu Xu, who had been kidnapped by Turbans, should not take the throne again. Li Xie was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Li Xie lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
